Game.Name: Wheel of Fortune (USA)
Game.plot: Overview:Wheel of Fortune is an adaptation of Merv Griffin's word puzzle quiz show that allows for up to three human players with a pass-and-play system. Players take it in turn to spin the wheel and guess the Hangman-esque puzzles by revealing letters until the answer becomes clear.The game was released on both the Genesis and Super Nintendo, with almost zero difference between the two versions. It would be followed up (on the SNES only) with Wheel of Fortune: Deluxe Edition, which uses slightly updated graphics.
Game.Notes: Wheel of Fortune as now bigger and better than ever in this all new Super Nintendo edition of television's most popular game-show. Featuring over 4,500 all new puzzles, digitized photography of the actual set and even digitized speech from the beautiful Vanna White. Choose the contestant you want to be, play against the computer or up to two friends spin the Wheel, buy a vowel or attempt to solve the puzzle before you go bankrupt.
